channel.title: Synapse Meetings
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 0.4.4
item.description:
What's new in 0.4.4

  • Fixed significant typing lag in the User Instructions editor in Settings

item.title: Version 0.4.3
item.description:
What's new in 0.4.3

  • Fixed search bar overlapping the first row in the recordings list
  • Calendar event title now used as the meeting title when recording starts from a calendar event
  • Attendees list now sorted alphabetically by first name

item.title: Version 0.4.2
item.description:
What's new in 0.4.2

  • Meeting notes — take and edit notes tied to each recording
  • Find & replace in transcripts and notes
  • Search within the recordings list
  • Editable AI prompts — customize how summaries are generated

item.title: Version 0.4.1
item.description:
What's new in 0.4.1

  • Fixed global hotkey not firing when the app is in the background — now prompts for Accessibility permission on launch and re-registers the monitor automatically once granted

item.title: Version 0.4.0
item.description:
What's new in 0.4.0

  • Speaker diarization — automatically identify and label different speakers in your meeting transcripts
  • Multi-speaker transcription with per-speaker timestamps
  • Speaker information included in AI summaries
  • Enable diarization in Settings with configurable speaker count
  • Fixed calendar access — properly signed with hardened runtime so the permission dialog appears correctly

item.title: Version 0.3.0
item.description:
What's new in 0.3.0

  • New audio device selection — choose specific input and output devices for recording
  • Calendar integration — view today's events and auto-fill meeting titles from your calendar
  • Audio device picker in Settings
  • Calendar sidebar during recording for quick event selection

item.title: Version 0.1.7
item.description:
What's new in 0.1.7

  • New Attendees sidebar during recording — quickly add, edit, and manage meeting participants while you record
  • Selected attendees are sent to Claude and formatted with [[brackets]] for Obsidian-style wiki links
  • Manually-specified attendees take priority over names inferred from the transcript

item.title: Version 0.1.6
item.description:
What's new in 0.1.6

  • Live transcription appears in real-time as you speak during recording
  • Take notes while recording — they're saved automatically and woven into the AI summary
  • Commit sidebar now remembers your last repo, branch, and folder

item.title: Version 0.1.5
item.description:
What's new in 0.1.5

  • Fixed a bug where pasting an API key with trailing whitespace or a newline caused summarization to fail with a 401 error

item.title: Version 0.1.4
item.description:
What's new in 0.1.4

  • New native toolbar Record button with proper hover and press states — no more floating pill 💅
  • Global hotkey to start/stop recording from anywhere, configurable in Settings → Shortcuts

item.title: Version 0.1.3
item.description:
What's new in 0.1.3

  • The application bundle is now named Synapse Meetings.app (with a space) instead of SynapseMeetings.app. Finder, Dock, and ⌘-Tab will now display the spaced name correctly.

One-time cleanup: if you previously installed 0.1.0–0.1.2, the old SynapseMeetings.app may remain in /Applications alongside the new Synapse Meetings.app. You can drag the old one to the Trash.

item.title: Version 0.1.2
item.description:
What's new in 0.1.2

  • Finder, Dock, and ⌘-Tab now display the app as “Synapse Meetings” (with a space). The 0.1.1 fix only updated the in-app menu bar; this release adds the localized InfoPlist.strings that Finder actually reads.

item.title: Version 0.1.1
item.description:
What's new in 0.1.1

  • New app icon with prominent recording dot
  • App now displays as “Synapse Meetings” (with a space) in Finder, Dock, and menu bar

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description:
Initial release

First public release of Synapse Meetings.
